title: scaevola linearis
intro: Scaevola linearis, also known as the blue fan flower or fan flower, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Scaevola linearis is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
